Community Reports

🏭

Industrial Effluent Discharge - Hazaribagh

critical
Hazaribagh, Dhaka3/10/2026

Observed heavy discoloration of water near tannery cluster. Strong chemical smell detected. Water appears dark purple/brown with visible foam.

verified12 validations
View details
🏗️

Illegal Land Filling - Turag River

high
Turag River, Tongi3/8/2026

Large-scale land filling operation observed. Multiple trucks dumping soil/debris. Significant river narrowing compared to last month.

investigating8 validations
View details
🌊

Riverbank Collapse - Jamuna River

critical
Sirajganj, Jamuna3/5/2026

Severe bank collapse observed after recent flooding. Multiple homes at risk. Visible cracks extending 50+ meters inland.

verified23 validations
View details
🏭

Textile Dye Discharge - Shitalakshya

high
Narayanganj, Shitalakshya3/2/2026

Bright blue/purple water observed downstream of textile zone. Multiple discharge pipes visible. Fish kill reported by local fishermen.

pending5 validations
View details
🏗️

Residential Construction - Buriganga

medium
Kamrangirchar, Dhaka2/28/2026

New residential buildings observed within river boundary. Appears to be multi-story development. No visible permits displayed.

resolved3 validations
View details

How It Works

1

Capture

Take a photo of environmental damage you observe in your community.

2

Upload

Submit the image with GPS location for precise geographic context.

3

AI Analysis

Our Gemini AI instantly analyzes the image for pollution, erosion, or encroachment.

4

Enforcement

Verified reports are shared with DoE and NRCC for regulatory action.

Together We Can Protect Bangladesh's Rivers

Every report helps build a more complete picture of environmental threats. Your observations, combined with satellite data, create actionable evidence for enforcement.

Learn About NodiWatchExplore Datasets
NodiWatch

AI-Powered Satellite Surveillance for Bangladesh River Ecosystems

© 2026 Team AlphaVerse. Eco-Tech Hackathon.

Platform

  • Pollution Monitoring
  • Encroachment Detection
  • Erosion Forecasting
  • Evidence Reports

Beneficiaries

  • Dept. of Environment (DoE)
  • National River Conservation Commission (NRCC)
  • Bangladesh Water Development Board (BWDB)
  • Environmental Courts
  • Bangladesh Bank (Green Banking)

Team AlphaVerse

  • Ahmmad Nur Swapnil
